I have this request I need to do that's been sitting on my page for too long. It's for Zuka, and trust it's being worked on.

I also have another past 7n7 bot to make that'll hopefully be more comical.

This is NOT the first time I've made a bot based on a Bojack Horseman episode. If I had a nickel </3

I need to write for more Forsaken members other than 7n7,,,
